title: Install LPG fuel systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install LPG fuel systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install LPG fuel system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 LPG fuel system installation information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 LPG fuel system installation information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 LPG fuel system installation information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to install LPG fuel system

elements.title: Carry out installation activities

pcs.text: LPG fuel system is checked for correct application and components are checked for damage2.2 LPG fuel system components are installed according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, safety and environmental requirements and AS/NZS 1425 LP Gas fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed LPG fuel system is tested for correct operation and required adjustments are made according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 1425
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can LPG fuel system is checked for correct application and components are checked for damage2.2 LPG fuel system components are installed according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, safety and environmental requirements and AS/NZS 1425 LP Gas fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed LPG fuel system is tested for correct operation and required adjustments are made according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 1425?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can LPG fuel system is checked for correct application and components are checked for damage2.2 LPG fuel system components are installed according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, safety and environmental requirements and AS/NZS 1425 LP Gas fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed LPG fuel system is tested for correct operation and required adjustments are made according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 1425.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out installation activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and system is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and system is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and system is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
